title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: SOUTH LANE CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 1275 S River Road Suite 200 Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL Hours: Varies by site (541) 682-3550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3550 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus route 98. Clinic is located next to Cottage Grove High School. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - GENERAL HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH LANE CLINIC
